have a very fine education; but it will not be completed.
The combination of Saturn and Jupiter indicates a gentle profession for
the native. As Saturn is retrograde the native may be· forced to change
professions now and then.
Saturn and Jupiter in their transit pass over the sign occupied
by Rahu. The lord of the sign occupied by Rahu is the Sun. This indicates
that the native will work in a news publishing concern. The native will,
from his 25th year, have only ordinary work. There will be no pleasure in
this kind of work.
The native will be married in his 30th year. The native's wife will be a
lady of good fortune, intellect and education.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 169
